g.text: Ready-gate: no Pod until the Certificate is Ready
Service DNS SANs | server auth + client auth | has a listener | inbound /v1/message edge | heartbeats
one task.agentry.io SAN | client auth only | no listener, no Service | no inbound edge | heartbeat 403
Step 5 rotates the leaf only. Both workloads must also watch $AGENTRY_CA_CERT and rebuild both trust
pools when the CA bundle itself changes: see CA Renewal and Re-Key.
